stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <CippImageCard
    title="Reports Illustration"
    text="This is a card showing reports and analytics."
    imageUrl="/assets/illustrations/undraw_lost_re_xqjt.svg"
    linkText="View Reports"
    link="/reports" />;

stories.name: Step Progress
Loading
stories.snippet:
const Loading = () => <CippImageCard
    title="Loading Reports"
    isFetching
    imageUrl="/assets/illustrations/undraw_website_ij0l.svg" />;

stories.name: Custom Button
stories.snippet:
const CustomButton = () => <CippImageCard
    title="Action Card"
    text="This card triggers a custom action."
    imageUrl="/assets/illustrations/undraw_website_ij0l.svg"
    linkText="Click Me"
    onButtonClick={() => alert('Button clicked!')} />;

components-cipptable-cippdatatable.name: CippDataTable

stories.name: Basic Usage
stories.snippet: const BasicUsage = () => <CippDataTable maxHeightOffset="100px" title="Basic User List" data={basicData} />;

stories.name: Simple Columns
All Formatters
stories.snippet:
const AllFormatters = () => <CippDataTable
    maxHeightOffset="100px"
    title="All Formatters (500 rows)"
    data={richDataset}
    simpleColumns={[
      'displayName',
      'userPrincipalName',
      'createdDateTime',
      'lastSignInDateTime',
      'accountEnabled',
      'proxyAddresses',
      'assignedLicenses',
      'Severity',
      'Status',
      'riskLevel',
      'state',
      'info.displayName',
      'businessPhones',
      'department',
    ]} />;

stories.name: Large Dataset 10 K Api
stories.snippet:
const LargeDataset10kApi = () => <CippDataTable
    maxHeightOffset="100px"
    title="API-Driven (10k rows)"
    api={{
      url: '/api/ListUsers',
      dataKey: 'Results',
    }}
    queryKey="storybook-ListUsers-10k"
    simpleColumns={[
      'displayName',
      'userPrincipalName',
      'createdDateTime',
      'lastSignInDateTime',
      'accountEnabled',
      'proxyAddresses',
      'assignedLicenses',
      'Severity',
      'Status',
      'riskLevel',
      'state',
      'businessPhones',
      'department',
      'jobTitle',
    ]} />;

actionlistitem.name: ActionListItem

stories.name: Primary
Example
stories.snippet:
const Example = () => <ActionListItem
    label="Mark as Paid"
    icon={(<SvgIcon fontSize="small">
      <CheckCircleIcon />
    </SvgIcon>)} />;

actionlist.name: ActionList

stories.name: Primary
stories.snippet: const Primary = () => <ActionList>{[]}</ActionList>;

stories.name: Example
stories.snippet:
const Example = () => <ActionList>{[
      <ActionListItem
        key="mark-as-paid"
        icon={
          <SvgIcon fontSize="small">
            <CheckCircleIcon />
          </SvgIcon>
        }
        label="Mark as Paid"
      />,
      <ActionListItem
        key="duplicate-order"
        disabled
        icon={
          <SvgIcon fontSize="small">
            <DocumentDuplicateIcon />
          </SvgIcon>
        }
        label="Duplicate Order"
      />,
      <ActionListItem
        key="request-refund"
        icon={
          <SvgIcon fontSize="small">
            <ReceiptRefundIcon />
          </SvgIcon>
        }
        label="Request a Refund"
      />,
    ]}</ActionList>;
